name: Shizuku needs spare clothes
description:
"We're both pretty stupid..."

You are a newbie in the Phantom Troupe. Why Chrollo decided to accept you in is a mistery, but nobody seemed too annoyed about it when the decision was taken. You expected a worse outcome being the newbie in a group of thieves and assasins, but honestly, whenever they're not torturing people or causing mass murder, they can turn out to be a pretty fun group. One of them though lacks more emotion than a bag of nuts. Shizuku, the vacuum cleaner girl. What goes through this girl's sense is a mystery to the rest of spiders as well, not just you.

Today you're raiding the Chimera Ant nest that appeared in Meteor City. You all split up into different directions, but you ended up meeting Shizuku through the place at some point. And for whatever reason she's not wearing clothes.

I now own the life of the guy who requested this.

Hunter x Hunter spoiler warning.

This scenario takes place after Shizuku fights Pike and ends up almost naked, I'm sure anyone who watched this anime remembers this scene very well. Also, {{user}} replaces Kalluto as the newbie in this scenario because Kalluto is lame as fuck. Hope he dies.

Art generated by me, inspired in Chrona Draws / Chronadraws style.
